examples: Thou wilt not miscall thyself again, as they say thou didst a little while agone?
Dost thou remember me, Hester, as I was nine years agone?
Objective To study the biological characteristics of the Salmonella agone .
The pope also commissioned the Church of Sant' Agnese in Agone, begun by Girolamo and Carlo Rainaldi, which Borromini finished.
Its name probably derives from a variation of agonalis or agone, for the games held in the emperor's oval stadium.
